title: Keyboard Avoid
description: Ensure the UI remains visible when the on-screen keyboard appears by using the KeyboardAvoidingView component.
problemStatement:
Don't hide the input! Wrap your `TextInput` inside a `<KeyboardAvoidingView>`. Use the `behavior` prop and set it to `"padding"` (common for iOS).

**Requirement:** Correctly import the component from `react-native`.
hints: Mobile keyboards often cover the bottom half of the screen; `KeyboardAvoidingView` helps push content up.
expectedOutput: An input field that shifts upward when the keyboard becomes active
